synced:
[00:16.23] I found your lighter in my nightstand
[00:20.22] That's why I'm thinkin' of you, I guess
[00:24.13] What part of "over" don't I understand?
[00:28.01] 'Cause damn, I miss the taste of your cigarette, yeah
[00:33.84] Your memory pulls me right back in
[00:38.28] It's like I forget
[00:39.71] I can't love you anymore
[00:43.98] Can't keep chasin' you 'round, 'round the back of my mind
[00:47.98] I can't need you anymore
[00:52.05] Can't keep sharin' this bed with your ghost every night
[00:56.34] I hate that your kiss left a burn on my lips
[01:00.99] Oh, baby, how do I tell my heart it ain't yours
[01:04.14] When I've said it before?
[01:07.91] I can't love you anymore
[01:11.39] Anymore
[01:13.45] Anymore
[01:16.72] Just when I think you'd let me let you go (let you go)
[01:20.52] There's a picture of us covered in dust on the dash
[01:24.44] Swore you lit it up just to see the smoke (to see the smoke)
[01:28.68] Wrote "Me plus you" with a date on the back
[01:32.14] Look at that, oh
[01:34.48] Your memory pulls me right back in
[01:38.64] It's like I forget
[01:40.24] I can't love you anymore

[02:12.95] Anymore
[02:14.80] I can't love ya
[02:16.06] No, I can't love you anymore
[02:19.00] Anymore
[02:20.00] Anymore (anymore), anymore, anymore
[02:22.46] Anymore
[02:25.38] Tell me, baby, ooh
[02:29.27] What do I do? What do I do?
[02:32.82] Could you tell me, baby? Ooh
[02:37.42] What do I do? What do I do?
[02:40.78] I can't love you anymore
[02:44.96] Can't keep chasin' you 'round, 'round the back of my mind
[02:48.74] I can't need you anymore (nah, I can't need ya, can't need ya)
[02:53.06] Can't keep sharin' this bed with your ghost every night

[03:05.08] When I've said it before?
[03:08.96] No, I can't love you anymore
